failure_signature: *: upgrade gomod to fix data race
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: upgrade gomod to fix data race.
